## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix

## Checklist

### Required
- [ ] `just check` passes (format, lint, test)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

### If Touching Standards
- [ ] `aps v1 validate repo` passes
- [ ] Updated `docs/01_spec.md` if spec changed
- [ ] Added/updated examples

### If New Standard/Experiment
- [ ] Created as experiment first (`EXP-V1-XXXX`)
- [ ] Includes `docs/01_spec.md`
- [ ] Includes at least one example
- [ ] Includes `agents/skills/` definitions
- [ ] Added to `Cargo.toml` workspace members
